frozen_reason: Restored Stage 5 command-harmony lane must prove current GeoSeal CLI routing, analog action compression, and lane-change signaling before any adapter push.

dataset_boundary.unseen_eval_rule: Eval prompts use the current harness-terminal and terminus-training surfaces rather than the removed command-harmony-map CLI spelling.

thresholds.decision_rule: Adapter pushes only if every Stage 5 command-harmony prompt passes.

failure_modes.counts_as_failure: Uses the removed command-harmony-map command or invents flags not exposed by python -m src.geoseal_cli.
Moves across provider, phase, or permission lanes without an explicit provider-pair or lane-change signal.
Claims runtime convergence when only a structural map, prompt plan, or training record is available.
Treats observe, move, inspect, solve, verify, and reset as prose instead of reusable terminal action primitives.

prompts.prompt: Show the current GeoSeal CLI command that prints the harness terminal as machine-readable JSON without probing the bridge. Include a two-model example using Ollama and DeepSeek, and do not use removed command names.
Explain the required signal when routing an agent pair from Ollama to DeepSeek for a benchmark. Include the exact signal shape and why the system blocks the pair without it.
Map a terminal-game coding task into six GeoSeal analog actions. Include observe-room, move-lane, inspect-object, solve-checkpoint, verify-evidence, and reset-run as compact reusable primitives.

For a KO/Python to AV/TypeScript add command mapping, distinguish structural-only alignment from runtime-verified convergence. State what evidence is needed before calling the outputs shared runtime output.
